---
title: |
  ?aayaaqa (Herring) Spawn Dynamics
author: |
  Landmark Fisheries Research BCSRIF2-3\
  Working Paper for Uu-a-thluk Fisheries


address: |
  ^1^Landmark Fisheries Research\
     213-2414 St Johns Street\
     Port Moody, British Columbia, V3H 2B1, Canada\


date: "March 2026"
geometry: letterpaper
toc: true
fontsize: 12pt
lineno: false #line number
draft: true # double spacing on
csl-refs: true
numbersections: true
link-citations: true
bibliography: bib/library.bib

# Any extra LaTeX code for the header:
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{color}
  - \usepackage{colortbl}
  - \usepackage{multirow}
  - \usepackage{lscape}
  - \usepackage{pdflscape}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{bbold}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usepackage{cmbright}
  - \usepackage{mathrsfs}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
  - \usepackage{pxfonts}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\logit}{logit}
  - \newcommand{\blandscape}{\begin{landscape}}
  - \newcommand{\elandscape}{\end{landscape}}
  - \DeclareMathOperator*{\argmax}{arg\,max}
  - \DeclareMathOperator*{\argmin}{arg\,min}
  - \usepackage[titletoc, title]{appendix}
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, cache=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide', warning=FALSE}
library(knitr)
if (is_latex_output()) {
  knitr_figs_dir <- "knitr-figs-pdf"
  knitr_cache_dir <- "knitr-cache-pdf"
  fig_out_type <- "pdf"
  kable_format <- "latex"
} else {
  knitr_figs_dir <- "knitr-figs-docx"
  knitr_cache_dir <- "knitr-cache-docx"
  fig_out_type <- "png"
  kable_format <- "pandoc"
  options(knitr.table.format = "pandoc")
}
fig_asp <- 0.618
fig_width <- 9
fig_out_width <- "6in"
fig_dpi <- 180
fig_align <- "center"
fig_pos <- "htb"
opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = knitr_figs_dir,
  cache.path = knitr_cache_dir,
  fig.asp = fig_asp,
  fig.width = fig_width,
  out.width = fig_out_width,
  echo = FALSE,
  cache.comments = FALSE,
  dev = fig_out_type,
  dpi = fig_dpi,
  fig.align = fig_align,
  fig.pos = fig_pos
)
```

```{r loadStuff, echo = FALSE, include = FALSE, message = FALSE }

# packages
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(kableExtra)
library(bookdown)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# TODO: source plotting and analysis scripts
# source('ms3Rtools.r')
# source('ms3Rplots.r')
# source('ms3Rstats.r')

# TODO: load simulation results
# load('data/sim_DDM/sim_DDM.Rdata')
# load('data/sim_1SpredM/sim_1SpredM.Rdata')
# load('data/sim_3SpredM/sim_3SpredM.Rdata')

```
